data.title: User Authentication
data.description: Utilizes OAuth 2.0 and two-factor authentication for secure user access.

data.title: Encryption Protocols
data.description: Data in transit is encrypted using TLS 1.2 or higher to prevent interception.
data.technical_spec: TLS/SSL encryption handling for network security.

data.title: Firewall Configuration
data.description: Strong perimeter defenses with customizable firewall rules.
data.technical_spec: Next-gen firewalls from vendors like Palo Alto Networks.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Continuous scanning and patching of potential vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Usage of tools like Nessus and Qualys.

data.title: Incident Response Plan
data.description: Comprehensive strategy for incident detection and remediation.
data.technical_spec: 24/7 monitoring team with predefined response protocols.
